raw_text:
```json
{
  "claim_texts": [
    "Senate Bill 894 aims to create a new off-highway vehicle competition program in California.",
    "The Red Sticker program, which allowed competition off-highway vehicles to operate in California, ended last year without a replacement.",
    "The termination of the Red Sticker program has led to confusion regarding permission to compete among competitors.",
    "The uncertainty around off-highway vehicle competitions negatively impacts local businesses, jobs, and the economy of rural and suburban regions in California.",
    "Funding for environmental work and law enforcement related to off-highway vehicle competitions has been lost due to the end of the Red Sticker program."
  ]
}
```
